creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
FreeBSD scorpio.seibercom.net 12.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE r341666 GENERIC  amd64

freebsd-version: 12.0-RELEASE-p2

mysql Ver 8.0.12 for FreeBSD12.0 on amd64 (Source distribution)


For months the following has been included in the daily security run output message:

******************************************************
Checking for packages with security vulnerabilities:
Database fetched: Fri Jan 11 03:53:02 EST 2019
mysql80-server-8.0.12_3
******************************************************

MySQL Server 8.0.13 has been available for quite some time now. Why hasn't the port been updated to eliminate this problem?

Thanks!

-- 
Gerard
